Banner.p: ✨ Caring massages for women, expectant mothers, babies, children, and teenagers. A gentle space to take care of yourself at every stage of life. ✨

Hero.h1: Wellness massage for women, children, and families in Présilly
Hero.p_1: At Haumana Bien-Être, I support women, children, and families in restoring balance, calm, and confidence through a holistic approach that connects body and emotions.
Hero.p_2: As a psychopractitioner and wellness massage therapist, I offer sessions that combine therapeutic dialogue and touch to release physical tension linked to emotions, soothe the mind, and rebalance the body.
Hero.p_3: My wellness massages for women, pregnant women, babies, children, and teenagers are designed as true spaces of release and reconnection.
Hero.p_4: Each session allows you to listen to what your body expresses, let go of what weighs you down, and rediscover softness, lightness, and serenity in your daily life.
Hero.p_5: Because body and mind are deeply connected, I support each person with care, kindness, and intuition to provide the most appropriate treatment in the present moment.
Hero.p_6: A moment to pause, reconnect, and restore your inner balance.
Hero.span: Through touch and words, I help everyone reconnect with their body, soothe their emotions, and reveal their inner well-being

About.note: I support women and children in rebalancing what has been disrupted through the body and emotions, thanks to the power of words combined with wellness massage.

Description.p_1: At Haumana Bien-Être, each session is a tailored moment where words and touch come together to restore balance to body and emotions. A time to refocus, release, and reconnect with your inner energy.
Description.p_2: Through caring listening and intuitive gestures, each treatment becomes a dialogue between body and mind. Everything is designed so you feel welcomed, understood, and deeply soothed.
Description.p_3: Inspired by nature and cultures from around the world, the Haumana universe invites you on an inner journey. Soft lighting and delicate scents create a warm atmosphere, ideal for letting go.

Benefits.intro: Discover our massage treatments and professional makeup services, dedicated to the well-being of women and babies. Whether you are looking for deep relaxation, maternity care, or natural makeup to enhance your beauty, we offer personalized services delivered with care and expertise.
Benefits.description_1: What if your fatigue, tension, or emotions weren’t a problem… but a message from your body? Renaissance sessions help you understand what your body is expressing, reduce stress, and restore inner balance.
Benefits.description_2: Treat yourself to a moment of deep relaxation with our massages dedicated to women. Our treatments are designed to release tension, soothe stress, and gently rebalance the body. Each massage is personalized for a complete and revitalizing experience.
Benefits.description_3: A gentle treatment for your baby’s well-being and relaxation. Our baby massages promote relaxation, sleep, and strengthen the parent-child bond. A tender and reassuring moment, adapted to little ones and delivered with a respectful and caring approach.
Benefits.description_4: Tailor-made packages to extend your relaxation time. Enjoy a complete experience combining several treatments at an attractive price. Perfect for a special moment or as an unforgettable wellness gift.
Benefits.description_5: Enhance your natural beauty with professional makeup tailored to every occasion. Natural, event, or personalized makeup—we reveal your glow with elegance and finesse.

Reviews.h2: What our clients say about us
Reviews.h3: Discover how our clients in Présilly experience Haumana Bien-Être and enjoy our treatments

Cta.h2: Turn your day into a moment of softness
Cta.p: Whether it’s a soothing massage or tailor-made makeup, I’m here to help you feel beautiful and relaxed. Book your session easily and let me take care of you.

PackagesPage.title: Our packages

description.title: One-month program
description.subtitle: Treat yourself to a month of relaxation with one massage per week, choosing between 1 hour or 30 minutes, designed to release tension and stress while revitalizing body and mind.

list.item_1_1: A dedicated moment to discuss your needs and goals.
list.item_1_2: Together, we choose the treatment plan best suited to you.
list.item_2_1: Total relaxation: release tension and fatigue
list.item_2_2: Renewed energy: regain vitality and serenity
list.item_2_3: Personalized massage: tailored to your current needs
list.item_3_1: Body-mind balance: a regular ritual for long-term benefits
list.item_3_2: Overall well-being: a relaxed body, a calm mind, and renewed energy.

PackagesPage.package_description_1: A month to breathe and release tension
PackagesPage.package_description_1_2: With 4 sessions of 30-minute massages, enjoy a regular moment to relax key areas of the body and restore lightness and balance in your daily life.
PackagesPage.package_description_2: A month to take care of yourself.
PackagesPage.package_description_2_2: With 4 personalized one-hour massages, give your body the consistency it deserves and feel week after week a lasting sense of calm and renewed energy.
PackagesPage.package_description_3: A month to strengthen the bond and soothe your baby.
PackagesPage.package_description_3_2: Through 3 sessions dedicated to relaxation and gentleness, support your baby in their first moments of well-being and share a unique bonding experience.

WomenPage.title: Our treatments for women

description.title: One-month program
description.subtitle: Each session is a unique moment, designed to offer you a true space for relaxation, listening, and reconnection—whether you are pregnant, a young mother, or simply a woman seeking long-term well-being.

list.item_1_1: A moment to get to know you, understand your needs, and set the intention for your treatment.
list.item_2_1: A relaxing and energizing massage tailored to your body and current energy, and/or a psychology session for deeper inner support.
list.item_3_1: A discussion about your feelings and insights, leaving with your personalized integration guide.
list.item_3_2: Bringing the subtle into the tangible.

WomenPage.package_description_1: Treat yourself to a moment of softness and well-being.
WomenPage.package_description_1_2: Each precise and enveloping movement guides you toward deep relaxation. Let tension fade away and enjoy a sense of serenity flowing through your entire body.
WomenPage.package_description_2: A tailor-made massage where touch and words come together.
WomenPage.package_description_2_2: Each gesture and each word guides you toward deep relaxation, for a unique and comforting wellness experience.
WomenPage.package_description_3: A gentle moment for you and your baby.
WomenPage.package_description_3_2: The Abhyanga mom-to-be massage is a soft and enveloping treatment that soothes the body, relieves tension, and nurtures the bond with your baby. From head to toe, every movement is designed to bring calm, comfort, and well-being, using warm Monoï oil adapted to your sensitive skin.

BabyTeenPage.title: Our treatments for babies & children

description.title: How baby & children sessions work
description.subtitle: Each treatment is a unique moment, filled with gentleness and care, designed to support the child’s development, emotions, and overall well-being.

list.item_1_1: Each session begins with a discussion to better understand the child, their world, needs, emotions, and sensitivities.
list.item_1_2: This listening time builds trust and allows the treatment to be fully adapted.
list.item_2_1: The core of the session: a gentle, personalized massage with adapted energy work.
list.item_2_2: Depending on age and needs, a moment of dialogue may help the child express emotions and feel soothed.
list.item_3_1: After the session, a gentle transition back: a herbal tea for older children, or a cuddle for babies, along with a comforting gesture.

BabyTeenPage.package_description_1: A gentle moment for little ones
BabyTeenPage.package_description_1_2: Mahana is a tailor-made massage where your child chooses the areas to be massaged: legs, back, arms, head, hands...
BabyTeenPage.package_description_1_3: Each movement brings calm and relaxation. Natural oils and soothing melodies create a soft sensory experience.
BabyTeenPage.package_description_2: A relaxing journey for older children.
BabyTeenPage.package_description_2_2: Aroha is a deeper, tailor-made massage designed for ages 9 to 14, promoting relaxation, emotional balance, and inner calm.
BabyTeenPage.package_description_2_3: Your child chooses the areas to be massaged and enjoys a soothing sensory experience.
BabyTeenPage.package_description_2_4: A moment to reconnect, breathe, and unwind away from daily stress.
BabyTeenPage.package_description_3: A month to strengthen the bond and soothe your baby.
BabyTeenPage.package_description_3_2: Through 3 sessions dedicated to relaxation and gentleness, support your baby’s well-being and share a special bonding moment.

harmonie-durable.name: Lasting Harmony
description: Treat yourself to a true moment of lasting well-being with our package of 4 one-hour massages, scheduled once a week over a month. Perfect for releasing built-up tension, calming the mind, and restoring deep harmony between body and soul.
Each session is fully tailored to your needs in the moment: back, legs, head, feet, hands, or abdomen. Week after week, you’ll experience a gradual sense of calm, improved sleep, and renewed energy.

This monthly package is a genuine wellness ritual designed to provide consistency and long-lasting results. Make an appointment with your serenity and transform each week into a moment of reconnection with yourself.

parenthese-essentielle.name: Essential Escape
description: Enjoy a weekly moment of relaxation with our package of 4 thirty-minute massages. Ideal for releasing tension, soothing both body and mind, and maintaining your well-being over time. Each session is fully customizable: choose the area you’d like to focus on based on your needs—back, feet, head, hands, legs, or abdomen.
This weekly ritual helps you restore balance, energy, and serenity, while creating a dedicated self-care moment just for you.

atelier-massage-bebe.name: Baby Massage Workshop
description: Treat yourself and your baby to three one-hour sessions dedicated to relaxation, discovery, and connection. Inspired by Indian traditions and yoga, this baby massage workshop supports your child’s harmonious development while strengthening the parent-child bond.
Throughout the sessions, you’ll learn to recognize and respond to your baby’s comfort cues, while offering them a sense of calm and security in a deeply nurturing shared moment.
The techniques taught can also help relieve common discomforts such as colic, constipation, sleep disturbances, muscle tension, or teething.
A progressive 3-session package designed to guide both parent and baby through a true ritual of well-being, tenderness, and connection.

l-essentiel.name: The Essential
description: Let yourself drift into deep relaxation, guided by precise movements that invite complete release. Each gesture, gentle and enveloping, leads you into a state of serenity, dissolving accumulated tension. Enjoy this soothing pause and allow relaxation to flow harmoniously through every part of your body.

haumana.name: Haumana
description: With careful attention to your needs and preferences, this personalized massage is designed to offer you an exceptional experience of relaxation and well-being. Each movement is thoughtfully adapted to meet your expectations and provide a unique sensory journey. Fully enjoy the benefits of this tailor-made massage and treat yourself to a moment of absolute relaxation.

future-maman.name: Mom-to-Be
description: The Abhyanga Mom-to-Be massage is a gentle, enveloping treatment that promotes relaxation, well-being, and harmony with your baby. From soft strokes to light stretches, every movement is designed to relieve the body and calm the mind. Warm Monoï oil from Tahiti, suitable for sensitive skin, brings comfort and soothing warmth. Enjoy a unique moment of serenity from the fourth month of pregnancy.

mahana.name: Mahana
description: Give your child a moment of gentleness and relaxation, where they can discover the benefits of touch freely. To respect their wishes and needs, they choose the areas to be massaged: legs, back, arms, head, or hands. Each movement is designed to bring calm and serenity, creating a true bubble of relaxation.
The natural, delicately scented oils awaken the senses while nourishing the skin. During the session, soft and soothing melodies fill the air, enhancing the dreamy and peaceful atmosphere.
A special moment where your child can reconnect with themselves, away from the noise and stress of daily life.

aroha.name: Aroha
description: Give your child a moment of gentleness and relaxation, where they can discover the benefits of touch freely. To respect their wishes and needs, they choose the areas to be massaged: legs, back, arms, head, or hands. Each movement is designed to bring calm and serenity, creating a true bubble of relaxation.
The natural, delicately scented oils awaken the senses while nourishing the skin. During the session, soft and soothing melodies fill the air, enhancing the dreamy and peaceful atmosphere.
A special moment where your child can reconnect with themselves, away from the noise and stress of daily life.

maquillage-de-jour-et-de-soiree.name: Day & Evening Makeup
description: Two approaches, one intention: to enhance your beauty with elegance.

Makeup is an art that reveals your natural beauty while respecting your personality and the occasion. Whether fresh and radiant for daytime or more intense and sophisticated for the evening, each look is designed to enhance your features with precision and elegance.
Using professional techniques and products tailored to your skin, makeup brightens the complexion, enhances the eyes, and balances facial features for a natural, harmonious, and long-lasting result.
✨ Each makeup look is fully personalized to suit your face, style, and occasion—so you feel beautiful, confident, and completely yourself.

maquillage-mariage.name: Bridal Makeup
description: For one of the most beautiful days of your life, your makeup should be natural, radiant, and perfectly aligned with your vision. Every detail matters so you can feel beautiful, confident, and serene throughout the day.
The service is divided into two stages:
1. Trial session – A dedicated moment to define your style, test shades, and perfect your look.
2. Wedding day – I travel to you to enhance your beauty in a calm and gentle atmosphere, with makeup that lasts all day and withstands emotions and photography.
✨ To enjoy this complete experience and ensure a flawless result from trial to your big day, contact me now to plan your bespoke bridal makeup.

maquillage-shooting-photo.name: Photoshoot Makeup
description: During a photoshoot, every detail matters. Makeup must be perfectly adapted to lighting, the camera, and the visual style to enhance your features while ensuring a harmonious and photogenic result.

Using professional techniques and studio-adapted products, makeup defines your features, brightens the complexion, and enhances the eyes—whether the look is natural or more sophisticated depending on the concept.
In collaboration with a professional photographer, we offer a complete experience where beauty and photography come together to create elegant, authentic images that reflect your personality.
✨ To enjoy this full experience and achieve a flawless result from makeup to photography, contact me now to plan your personalized session.

transformation.name: Transformation
transformation.title: A deep journey for lasting change.
description: A complete program to sustainably transform your emotional and physical balance.
Here, we go deeper: we release, soothe, and transform at the core.
For you if you feel tired, emotionally overwhelmed, or under pressure, with physical tension and a need to breathe and reset.
This journey helps release accumulated tension, calm emotions, and support a true process of inner transformation.

list.1: 8 personalized sessions tailored to your needs
list.2: Deep work on body and emotions
list.5: A symbolic closing ritual to honor your journey

eveil.name: Awakening
eveil.title: A first step to reconnect with yourself
description: A short program to release initial tension, soothe your emotions, and begin listening to your body.
This journey helps you better understand the connection between your emotions and your body, gently initiating a process of rebalancing.
For you if you feel it’s time to reconnect with yourself, better understand what you’re going through, and bring lasting calm to your body and mind.

list.1: 8 personalized sessions tailored to your needs
list.2: Deep work on body and emotions

list.item_1_1: A moment to get to know you, understand your needs, and set the intention for your treatment.

list.item_1_1: We begin by defining what truly suits you: your preferences, your personality, and the occasion you’re celebrating.

list.item_3_1: The final result reveals the best version of you: makeup that enhances your features and gives you confidence and elegance, ready to shine in every moment.

MakeUpPage.title: Professional Makeup – The Art of Enhancing Your Beauty
MakeUpPage.subtitle: Reveal your beauty with bespoke makeup: every gesture and every shade is chosen to enhance your features and reflect your style and personality.

wedding.name: Bridal Makeup
wedding.description: Elegant, long-lasting bridal makeup designed to enhance your natural beauty on your wedding day. Created using professional high-definition products, it ensures a radiant complexion and flawless makeup that lasts throughout the day and photographs beautifully.

daily.name: Day & Evening Makeup
daily.description: Makeup is an art that adapts to your needs, your personality, and the occasion. While daytime makeup focuses on freshness and simplicity, evening makeup embraces intensity and glamour.

shooting.name: Photoshoot Makeup
shooting.description: For a photoshoot, every detail matters. Your makeup and hair must enhance your features while aligning perfectly with the style and theme of the images. Working with professionals ensures a flawless result—natural or sophisticated—that withstands studio lighting and camera angles.

photoNote.note: I collaborate with a talented photographer to offer you a complete and memorable experience. Together, we combine the art of beauty and photography to create images that capture your essence and your style.

intro.title: Emotional & Body Rebalancing Support
intro.subtitle: For women and/or mothers who feel exhausted and want to reconnect with themselves, find peace, and bring harmony back into their lives and families.

block1.p1: There comes a time in a woman’s life when the body slows down, emotions become more intense, and a deep need to reconnect with oneself arises.
block1.p2: Stress, mental load, emotional fatigue, physical tension, loss of direction… These sensations are not random. They are often messengers of an inner imbalance or a need to be heard that has been ignored for too long.

block2.p1: Behind these signs lies an invitation: to slow down, return to yourself, and reconnect with your body.
block2.p2: It is to support these transitional phases that I created the Renaissance programs.

block3.p1: Based on the RÉSONANCE Method, these programs offer a gentle and holistic approach that connects words, body, and emotions.

intro.conclusion: A space to release, feel, understand… and gently reconnect with yourself.

method.title: An approach based on my RÉSONANCE Method
method.intro: Each Renaissance program is built on a shared approach:
method.final_p: This approach works deeply on the body, emotions, and your connection to yourself.

1.title: Listening to the body’s messages
1.content: Understanding the emotions expressed through the body, identifying what tension, fatigue, or blockages reveal about your emotional experience.

2.title: Understanding what the body expresses
2.content: Listening to tension and pain as messages, giving meaning to sensations, and gradually releasing what has built up over time.

3.title: Soothing the nervous system
3.content: Regulating the nervous system to ease stress and emotional overload, allowing the body to return to a state of safety and relaxation.

4.title: Releasing tension through touch
4.content: Rebalancing the body through touch to release physical and emotional tension, encouraging deep relaxation.

5.title: Restoring inner balance
5.content: Reconnecting with yourself, regaining emotional stability, and experiencing daily life with more ease and lightness.

1.name: Transformation
1.description: A deep, transformative journey designed to sustainably restore your emotional and physical balance. This program helps release accumulated tension, soothe emotions, and support a true process of inner transformation. Sessions are spaced over time to allow the body and emotions to gently integrate lasting change.

list.1: 8 personalized sessions tailored to your needs
list.2: Deep work on body and emotions
list.5: A symbolic closing ritual to honor your journey

2.name: Awakening
2.description: A first step toward listening to your body and beginning to release physical and emotional tension. This program helps you better understand the connection between your emotions and your body, gently initiating a rebalancing process.

women.name: Renaissance Woman
women.title: Reconnect with yourself and restore balance
women.intro: This program is for women who experience:
points: physical tension or pain linked to stress
a feeling of being disconnected from themselves
women.text: Renaissance Woman is a space to slow down, release what weighs on you, and rebalance both body and emotions.
women.result: Regain energy, clarity, and inner stability through a journey combining listening, body awareness, and therapeutic touch.
women.cta: I want to reconnect with myself

mom.name: Renaissance Mother

mom.intro: This program is for women who experience:
points: physical tension or pain linked to stress
a feeling of being disconnected from themselves
mom.text: Renaissance Mother offers a space to slow down, release pressure, and restore harmony within yourself and your relationship with your child.
mom.result: Find calm, clarity, and emotional balance to nurture a more peaceful daily life and a deeper connection.
mom.cta: Bring peace to my daily life

pma.name: Renaissance Fertility
pma.title: Restore trust in your body
pma.intro: This program is for women who experience:
points: physical tension or pain linked to stress
a feeling of being disconnected from themselves
pma.text: A gentle and supportive space to reconnect with your body, release emotional tension, and regain trust during your fertility journey.
pma.result: Feel more grounded, supported, and aligned with your body throughout your journey.

postNatal.name: Renaissance Postnatal
postNatal.title: Soothe the mother to transform the bond
postNatal.intro: This program is for women who experience:
points: physical tension or pain linked to stress
a feeling of being disconnected from themselves
postNatal.text: A nurturing space to support you after birth, helping you reconnect with your body and emotions while adjusting to this new chapter.
postNatal.result: Restore energy, emotional balance, and a sense of grounding after childbirth.

finalCta.title: Taking care of yourself is not a luxury
finalCta.description: If you feel called to this support but aren’t sure which option is right for you, simply reach out—together, we’ll find what best suits your needs.
finalCta.cta: Write to me here to talk about it

section3.title: 3 - Intellectual Property
section3.text:

Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, or adaptation of all or part of the website elements, regardless of the means or process used, is prohibited without prior written authorization from MRS AMBRE CHIARINELLI (HAUMANA BIEN-ÊTRE).



Any unauthorized use of the website or any of its elements will be considered an infringement and may result in legal action.

section4.title: 4 - Personal Data / GDPR
section4.p1: Personal data collected via this website (booking forms, contact forms, newsletter subscriptions) is used exclusively by MRS AMBRE CHIARINELLI (HAUMANA BIEN-ÊTRE) for the following purposes: managing bookings, communicating with users, and sending newsletters (where consent has been given).
section4.p2: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, restrict processing, object to processing, and request data portability. You may withdraw your consent at any time.
section4.p3: To exercise your rights, please contact us at: <email>contact@haumana-bien-etre.com</email>.
section4.p4: For more information on how your data is collected and processed, please refer to our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
section4.p5: Personal data is retained only for as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, unless otherwise required by law or regulation.

section5.title: 5 - Cookies
section5.p1: Browsing the website <website>https://www.haumana-bien-etre.com</website> may result in the installation of cookie(s) on the user's device.
section5.p2: A "cookie" is a small file that records information relating to a user's browsing activity on a website. The data obtained is used, for example, to facilitate future navigation or to measure website traffic.
section5.introList: The cookies used on this website include:
section5.cookie1: Essential cookies: necessary for the proper functioning of the website (navigation, bookings).
section5.cookie2: Analytics cookies: used to measure traffic and improve user experience (anonymous statistics via Google Analytics).
section5.cookie3: Advertising cookies (if applicable): used to personalize ads on other websites.
section5.p3: You can accept or refuse cookies by adjusting your browser settings. No non-essential cookies will be placed without your consent. Upon your first visit, a banner allows you to manage your preferences.
section5.p4: Cookies are stored for a maximum duration of 13 months from their placement on your device.
section5.p5: For more details on how cookies are used, please refer to our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

section6.title: 6 - Liability
section6.p1: MRS AMBRE CHIARINELLI (HAUMANA BIEN-ÊTRE) shall not be held liable for any direct or indirect damage caused to the user's equipment when accessing the website https://www.haumana-bien-etre.com.
section6.p2: MRS AMBRE CHIARINELLI (HAUMANA BIEN-ÊTRE) declines all responsibility for the use that may be made of the information and content present on the website.
section6.p3: Despite all efforts made to ensure the accuracy and updating of the content, MRS AMBRE CHIARINELLI (HAUMANA BIEN-ÊTRE) cannot be held responsible for any errors or omissions. The website may be suspended or interrupted without notice for maintenance or technical reasons.
section6.introList: MRS AMBRE CHIARINELLI (HAUMANA BIEN-ÊTRE) undertakes to secure the website as best as possible. However, liability cannot be incurred in the event of:
section6.li1: Force majeure (natural events, disasters, strikes, unforeseen legal or regulatory incidents).
section6.li2: Failure, malfunction, or unavailability of the server or internet network.
section6.li3: Intrusion, hacking, or malicious actions by third parties affecting the website or data.
section6.li4: Unauthorized import or installation of unwanted data on the website.
section6.p4: Interactive areas (contact forms, bookings, etc.) are available to users. MRS AMBRE CHIARINELLI (HAUMANA BIEN-ÊTRE) reserves the right to remove, without prior notice, any content that violates applicable French legislation, particularly in relation to data protection.
section6.p5: Where applicable, MRS AMBRE CHIARINELLI (HAUMANA BIEN-ÊTRE) also reserves the right to hold users civilly and/or criminally liable, particularly in the event of racist, abusive, defamatory, or pornographic content, regardless of the medium used (text, images, etc.).

section7.p1: The website <website>https://www.haumana-bien-etre.com</website> may contain hyperlinks redirecting to third-party websites. These links are provided for informational purposes only.
section7.p2: MRS AMBRE CHIARINELLI (HAUMANA BIEN-ÊTRE) has no control over the content, accuracy, legality, or availability of these external websites and cannot be held liable for any direct or indirect damage resulting from access to or use of such third-party resources.
section7.p3: The inclusion of such links does not imply any endorsement or association with the operators of these websites. Users are encouraged to review the terms of use and privacy policies of each third-party website before browsing or interacting with them.

section8.title: 8 - Governing Law and Jurisdiction
section8.text: These legal notices are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to the use of this website shall fall under the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris.

section1.title: 1 – Introduction
section1.p1: The website Haumana Bien-Être (https://www.haumana-bien-etre.com) is owned by MRS AMBRE CHIARINELLI (HAUMANA BIEN-ÊTRE), who is the data controller of your personal data.
section1.p2: We have adopted this Privacy Policy, which outlines how we process the information collected by Haumana Bien-Être (https://www.haumana-bien-etre.com) and explains why we must collect certain personal data about you. Therefore, you should read this Privacy Policy before using the Haumana Bien-Être (https://www.haumana-bien-etre.com) website.
section1.p3: We take your personal data seriously and are committed to ensuring its confidentiality and security.

section2.title: 2 – Personal Information We Collect
section2.p1:
When you visit the Haumana Bien-Être (https://www.haumana-bien-etre.com) website, we automatically collect certain information about your device, including your web browser, IP address, time zone, and installed cookies, as well as information about the pages you view.

Additionally, as you browse the website, we collect information about the individual pages or services you view, the websites or search terms that referred you to the website, and how you interact with the website. We refer to this automatically collected information as "Device Information".
section2.p2: We may also collect the personal data you provide to us (such as name, address, payment information, etc.) when you register or place an order, in order to fulfill the contract.

section3.title: 3 – Why Do We Process Your Data?
section3.p1: Our top priority is the security of customer data, and as such, we only process minimal user data, strictly to the extent necessary to maintain the website.
section3.p2: Automatically collected data is used solely to identify potential cases of abuse and to establish anonymized statistical information regarding website usage. This statistical information is not otherwise aggregated in a way that would identify any particular user.
section3.p3: You can visit the website without telling us who you are or revealing any information that could identify you as a specific individual. However, if you wish to use certain features of the website, receive our newsletter, or provide other details by filling out a form, you may provide us with personal data such as your email address, first name, last name, city of residence, organization, or phone number. You may choose not to provide your personal data, but this may prevent you from taking advantage of certain features of the website. For example, you may not be able to receive our newsletter or contact us directly through the website. Users who are unsure about which information is mandatory are welcome to contact us at <email>contact@haumana-bien-etre.com</email>.

section4.title: 4 – Your Rights
section4.intro: If you are a European resident, you have the following rights:
section4.li8: Rights related to automated decision-making and profiling.
section4.p1: To exercise your rights, please contact us at <email>contact@haumana-bien-etre.com</email>.
section4.p2: Additionally, if you are a European resident, we note that we process your information in order to fulfill contracts we might have with you (for example, if you place an order through the Site), or otherwise to pursue our legitimate business interests listed above. Furthermore, please note that your information may be transferred outside of Europe, including to Canada and the United States.

section5.title: 5 – Links to Other Websites
section5.p1: Our website may contain links to other websites that are not owned or controlled by us. Please be aware that we are not responsible for such other websites or the privacy practices of third parties. We encourage you to be aware when you leave our website and to read the privacy statements of each website that may collect personal information.

section6.title: 6 – Information Security
section6.p1: We secure the information you provide on computer servers in a controlled, secure environment, protected against unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. We maintain reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards to protect against unauthorized access, use, modification, and disclosure of personal data under our control and custody. However, no data transmission over the Internet or wireless network can be guaranteed.

section7.title: 7 – Legal Disclosure
section7.p1: We will disclose any information we collect, use, or receive if required or permitted by law, such as to comply with a subpoena or similar legal process, and when we believe in good faith that disclosure is necessary to protect our rights, your safety or the safety of others, investigate fraud, or respond to a government request.

section8.title: 8 – Changes to This Policy
section8.p1: We reserve the right to modify this Privacy Policy at any time. The version in force is the one published on the website as of the date indicated at the top of the page.

section9.title: 9 – Contact
section9.p1: If you would like to contact us to better understand this Policy or wish to contact us regarding any matter relating to individual rights and your personal information, please contact us at <email>contact@haumana-bien-etre.com</email>.

s17.p1: These Terms and Conditions are governed by French law.

sub1.title: 17.1 Consumer Protection
sub1.p1: Mandatory French consumer protection laws fully apply.

sub2.title: 17.2 Interpretation
sub2.p1: In case of discrepancy between language versions, the French version shall prevail.

sub3.title: 17.3 Severability
sub3.p1: If any provision is declared invalid, the remaining provisions remain in force.

sub1.title: 18.1 Amicable Resolution
sub1.p1: In case of dispute, parties agree to seek an amicable solution first.
sub1.p2: The Client is invited to contact the Service Provider:
sub1.li3: or via the details in the legal notice

sub2.title: 18.2 Consumer Mediation
sub2.p1: In accordance with French law, the Client may use a consumer mediator free of charge.
sub2.p2: After a prior written request to the Service Provider that has not received a satisfactory response, or in the absence of a response within a reasonable period, the Client may refer the matter to the competent mediator.

sub3.title: 18.3 Competent Jurisdiction
sub3.p1: In the absence of an amicable resolution, any dispute shall be brought before the competent French courts in accordance with the applicable rules of law.
sub3.p2: The consumer Client may bring proceedings before:
sub3.li1: either one of the courts with territorial jurisdiction under the Code of Civil Procedure
sub3.li2: or the court of the place where they resided at the time of the conclusion of the contract or the occurrence of the harmful event
